title: Asset Transfer Network
description: Information required to facilitate asset transfer from this account

identifier.description: The number used to identify the account within the asset transfer network. If identifierType is ACCOUNT_NUMBER, this is the account number; if identifierType is TOKENIZED_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, this is a tokenized account number

institutionName.description: The name of the institution holding the account

institutionId.description: Institution identifier used by the asset transfer network, e.g., the Depository Trust and Clearing Corporation code for the institution holding the account

jointAccount.description: Whether this account has joint owners
